name: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: High-fidelity wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and premium memory foam ear cushions. Bluetooth 5.3 compatible.

name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Soft, breathable organic cotton crew neck t-shirt. Pre-shrunk, available in 12 colors. Fair trade certified.

name: Bamboo Phone Stand
description: Eco-friendly bamboo phone and tablet stand with adjustable angle. Compatible with all devices up to 12.9 inches.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. BPA-free, 750ml capacity.

name: Yoga Mat Pro
description: Professional-grade non-slip yoga mat with alignment markings. 6mm thick TPE foam, eco-friendly and latex-free.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with 5 color temperatures and 7 brightness levels. USB charging port, touch controls, and memory function.

name: Leather Wallet Bifold
description: Genuine full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking. 8 card slots, 2 bill compartments, and coin pocket.

name: Aromatherapy Candle Set
description: Set of 4 hand-poured soy wax candles. Lavender, eucalyptus, vanilla, and sandalwood scents. 25-hour burn time each.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Full-size mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Brown switches. RGB backlighting, aluminum frame, detachable USB-C cable.

name: Running Shoes Ultralight
description: Lightweight mesh running shoes with responsive cushioning. Breathable upper, rubber outsole, and reflective details for visibility.

name: Cast Iron Skillet 12-inch
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet, 12-inch diameter. Oven safe to 500F, compatible with all cooktops including induction.

name: Bluetooth Portable Speaker
description: Waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. 20-hour battery, built-in microphone, IPX7 rated.

name: Linen Throw Blanket
description: Stonewashed French linen throw blanket. 140x200cm, hypoallergenic, naturally temperature regulating. Machine washable.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Handcrafted ceramic pour-over coffee dripper with matching mug and bamboo stand. Includes 50 paper filters.

name: Noise-Canceling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with hybrid active noise cancellation. 8-hour battery plus 24 hours with case. IPX5 sweat resistant.

name: Standing Desk Converter
description: Height-adjustable standing desk converter with gas spring lift. 32-inch wide surface, dual monitor support, keyboard tray.

name: Plant-Based Protein Powder
description: Organic plant-based protein blend: pea, hemp, and brown rice. 25g protein per serving, vanilla flavor, no artificial sweeteners.

name: Wool Blend Scarf
description: Luxurious merino wool blend scarf with cashmere. 180cm length, herringbone pattern, hand-finished edges.

name: 4K Webcam Pro
description: Ultra HD 4K webcam with auto-focus, built-in ring light, and AI-powered background blur. USB-C, compatible with all major platforms.

name: Resistance Band Set
description: Set of 5 natural latex resistance bands with varying tensions (5-50 lbs). Includes door anchor, ankle straps, and carry bag.

name: Ceramic Knife Set
description: Professional 5-piece ceramic knife set with bamboo block. Ultra-sharp zirconia blades, ergonomic handles, rust-proof.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Adjustable ergonomic mesh office chair with lumbar support, headrest, and 4D armrests. 300lb capacity, tilt lock mechanism.

name: Natural Lip Balm Pack
description: Set of 6 organic lip balms: honey, mint, berry, citrus, coconut, and unflavored. Beeswax and shea butter formula, SPF 15.

name: Recycled Notebook Set
description: Pack of 3 A5 notebooks made from 100% recycled paper. 80 pages each, dot grid, lay-flat binding, FSC certified.

name: Vitamin D3 Supplements
description: High-potency Vitamin D3 2000 IU softgels. 180-day supply, easily absorbed, non-GMO, gluten-free, third-party tested.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Compact genuine leather crossbody bag with adjustable strap. Multiple compartments, magnetic closure, fits phones up to 6.7 inches.

name: Indoor Herb Garden Kit
description: Self-watering indoor herb garden with LED grow lights. Includes basil, cilantro, and parsley seed pods. Automatic timer.

name: Cotton Crew Socks 6-Pack
description: Premium combed cotton crew socks with arch support and reinforced heel and toe. Moisture-wicking, available in solid colors.

name: Espresso Machine
description: Semi-automatic espresso machine with 15-bar pressure pump, built-in grinder, and steam wand. Programmable shot volume, stainless steel body.

name: Meditation Cushion
description: Organic buckwheat hull meditation cushion with removable washable cover. Traditional zafu design, 14-inch diameter, adjustable height.
